items.title: Northbound Haze
items.description: A juicy, hazy IPA from a small Midwest craft outfit, built for drinkability over bitterness.

items.title: Verge West Coast IPA
items.description: Pine and citrus up front, a clean bitter finish — the classic West Coast style done right.

items.title: Anchor Line Pale Ale
items.description: An easygoing domestic pale ale with a light citrus hop character, built for a long session.

items.title: Blackout Double IPA
items.description: A hazy double IPA loaded with tropical hops — sneaky strong, worth pacing yourself.

items.title: Steel City Session IPA
items.description: All the hop character, a fraction of the ABV — built for round two.

items.title: Southern Cross Hop Lager
items.description: A New Zealand import lager, dry-hopped for a bright, fruit-forward twist on a lager base.

items.title: Clearwater Helles
items.description: A traditional German-style Helles lager — soft bread crust malt, clean and easy-drinking.

items.title: Cantina Lager
items.description: A crisp Mexican-style lager with a light corn sweetness, best served with a lime wedge.

items.title: Brasserie Pils
items.description: A Belgian-style pilsner, dry-hopped for a touch more bitterness than its German cousins.

items.title: Roadside Light
items.description: A straightforward American light lager — low calorie, high drinkability, zero pretense.

items.title: Amber Hour Vienna Lager
items.description: A malt-forward Vienna lager with notes of toasted bread and light caramel.

items.title: Millrace Dunkel
items.description: A dark Bavarian-style lager, rich with toasted malt and a whisper of chocolate.

items.title: Coal Tender Porter
items.description: A robust porter with notes of dark chocolate and roasted coffee.

items.title: Midnight Freight Stout
items.description: A dry stout with a firm roasted bitterness and a thin, lasting head.

items.title: Black Anchor Imperial Stout
items.description: A rich imperial stout aged on oak, heavy with vanilla and dark fruit.

items.title: Harborline Oatmeal Stout
items.description: A silky oatmeal stout, smooth and slightly sweet, with a whisper of cocoa.

items.title: Abbey Gate Stout
items.description: A Belgian-influenced stout with dark caramel sweetness and a dry finish.

items.title: Cloudline Hefeweizen
items.description: A classic German wheat beer with notes of banana and clove, unfiltered and cloudy.

items.title: Brightwell Witbier
items.description: A Belgian-style wit brewed with coriander and orange peel, light and refreshing.

items.title: Abbaye Tripel
items.description: A strong Belgian tripel, golden and effervescent, with notes of pear and clove.

items.title: Old Cobblestone Dubbel
items.description: A malty Belgian dubbel with dark fruit sweetness and a warming finish.

items.title: Harvest Moon Wheat
items.description: An American wheat ale, light-bodied with a mild citrus edge.
